$description: Component tokens for Time Picker with multiple size variants (3xs-lg) and optional AM/PM and timezone selectors. Supports default and disabled states. Figma Reference: Node ID 27343-28873

$component.name: Time Picker
$component.description: A specialized input component for time selection with HH:MM:SS format display, featuring optional AM/PM selector and timezone selector. The component consists of three segments: time input field (with clock icon), AM/PM dropdown (optional), and timezone dropdown (optional).
$component.structure: Horizontal layout with three connected segments: Time Input Field (left with rounded-left corners), AM/PM Select (center, optional), Time Zone Select (right with rounded-right corners, optional). All segments share borders and maintain consistent height.

sizes.3xs: 24px height - Minimal size for very compact layouts
sizes.2xs: 28px height - Extra small for dense forms
sizes.xs: 32px height - Small size for compact interfaces
sizes.sm: 36px height - Standard small size for most forms
sizes.lg: 44px height - Large size for prominent time selection

states.default: Standard enabled state with white background for normal interaction
states.disabled: Inactive state with gray-50 background and reduced text/icon contrast

features.time-format: HH:MM:SS display with clock icon on the left
features.visual-structure: Three connected segments with shared borders - left segment has left rounded corners, right segment has right rounded corners

usage.contexts: Scheduling interfaces, appointment booking, calendar events, time logging, forms requiring precise time input with timezone awareness
usage.best-practices: Use AM/PM selector for 12-hour format contexts, include timezone selector for international scheduling, maintain consistent sizing across related form inputs

time-input-field.$comment: Time input field segment - displays HH:MM:SS with clock icon (left segment of time picker)

height.$comment: Time input field heights matching input component standards

3xs.description: Time input field height for 3xs size (24px)

2xs.description: Time input field height for 2xs size (28px)

xs.description: Time input field height for xs size (32px)

sm.description: Time input field height for sm size (36px)

md.description: Time input field height for md size (40px)

lg.description: Time input field height for lg size (44px)

border.$comment: Border styling for time input field - only left segment has full border, others have right border only

padding.$comment: Internal spacing for time input field content

gap.$comment: Gap between elements inside time input field (clock icon, time digits, colons)

between-elements.description: Gap between clock icon and first time digit (8px)

between-digits.description: Gap between time digits and colons (4px)

clock-icon.$comment: Clock icon displayed at the start of time input field

default.description: Clock icon color in default state (gray-500)

disabled.description: Clock icon color in disabled state (gray-300 / #D0D5DD)
